name: Rabia
bio: Rabia leads marketing strategy and content production for Alphabyte AI. She owns the brand voice, LinkedIn presence, and consent marketing programme that drives awareness and inbound interest for the practice.

Her work covers the full marketing stack — from long-form thought leadership and social content to campaign execution and audience development. She ensures every piece of published content reflects the Alphabyte voice: calm, direct, and grounded in real work.

credentials.keyCoursework: Digital Marketing · Brand Management · Content Marketing · Social Media Strategy · Analytics

achievements: Established the Alphabyte AI brand voice and content guidelines
Built and grew the Alphabyte LinkedIn presence from launch
Designed the consent marketing programme for inbound lead generation

footerBio.name: Alphabyte AI
footerBio.description: The Claude-focused practice of Alphabyte Solutions. Mid-market AI from the ground up — citizen development, executive enablement, MCP integration, and autonomous agents.
